posts.author: renato.rosa (Renato Rosa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Automatic action - Monday x Network / Tax disc

Hello friends !

Is there any way, when creating an element in the frame, that Monday creates an automatic folder in a specific physical location on my network?

I ask, because each element in the table means a business in progress, it is mandatory within my flow to create a physical folder for this business, so I would like to eliminate this manual action of registering on Monday and on the Network / Physical Disk.

Thanks !!!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @renato.rosa, thanks for posting about this!

At the moment, there’s no way to create an automatic folder in a specific physical location on your network.

I would recommend reaching out to support@monday.com if you’d like to discuss further and we’d be happy to pass your request to our product team from there.
